$comment: Derived view of the Case superset for the CLN_ALTG workflow. Generated by scripts/export_case_views.py; do not edit by hand.
description:
The case data structure: a reusable, permissive superset of the case-level
information a curator captures for a single human observation.

A ``Case`` is shared across the workflows that consume case information to
determine applicability and score human-observation evidence. Every field is
optional here; which fields are required/optional/conditional/not-applicable
per workflow is expressed by the applicability matrix, not by this type.

``moi`` and ``pop_frq_points`` are **not** part of the Case — they are
workflow parameters (see :class:`WorkflowParameters`).

additional_variant_exists.description:
Tri-state truth value.

``TRUE``/``FALSE`` — the curator established the value. ``UNKNOWN`` —
the curator looked and could not determine it. A ``null`` field (absent)
means the value was **not captured at all**; ``UNKNOWN`` and ``null`` are
semantically distinct.
additional_variant_exists.title: TriState

additional_variants.description: Additional variant(s); populated only if `additional_variant_exists` is TRUE.

items.description: An additional variant in the case (ALTV/ALTG, or AFF when present).

classification.description: Variant classification; must be P/LP for the ALTV and ALTG workflows.
classification.title: Classification

gene.description:
A gene reference (symbol/id/transcript); ``mde_associated_gene`` flags
whether it is the MDE-associated gene (set when it differs from the VBC gene).

mde_associated_gene.description: MDE-associated gene, required when the gene differs from the VBC gene.
mde_associated_gene.title: Mde Associated Gene

gene.title: Gene

zygosity.description: Zygosity of a variant in the case.
zygosity.title: Zygosity

items.title: AdditionalVariant

additional_variants.title: Additional Variants

age.description: A structured age covering point values, bounds, and ranges.

qualifier.description: How to read an :class:`Age`: a point value, a bound, or a range.
qualifier.title: AgeQualifier

unit.description: Unit for an :class:`Age` value or bounds.
unit.title: AgeUnit

age.title: Age

family_id.description: Family identifier, used to match relatives across workflows.
family_id.title: Family Id

id.description: Proband identifier, used to match individuals across workflows.
id.title: Id

pheno_severity.description:
Phenotype severity relative to expectation.

``BIALLELIC_LT_EXPECTED`` is not applicable to the ALT Gene workflow
(see the applicability matrix's ``enum_exclude`` rule).
pheno_severity.title: PhenoSeverity

phenotypes.description: 0..many phenotypes; capture at least what is relevant to the case.

items.description: A phenotype as a ``{name, code}`` pair; either may stand alone.

name.description: Label of the coded entry when a code is given; otherwise a free-text term the curator could not confidently match to HPO.
name.title: Name

items.title: Phenotype

phenotypes.title: Phenotypes

sex.description: Proband sex: Male / Female / Unknown / Trans.
sex.title: Sex

vbc_exists.description:
Tri-state truth value.

``TRUE``/``FALSE`` — the curator established the value. ``UNKNOWN`` —
the curator looked and could not determine it. A ``null`` field (absent)
means the value was **not captured at all**; ``UNKNOWN`` and ``null`` are
semantically distinct.
vbc_exists.title: TriState

vbc_zygosity.description: Zygosity of a variant in the case.
vbc_zygosity.title: Zygosity

title: Case (CLN_ALTG)
